query: Tahoe Rim Tour cross country ski race Lake Tahoe

videos.title: Tahoe Rim Tour XC Race
videos.description: For more information about Sugar Bowl Academy, visit sbacademy.org and sugarbowlacademy.blogspot.com

videos.title: Cross Country skiing in bitter cold (-12° C) at Tahoe Donner Cross Country, Truckee, CA
videos.description: We enjoy a cold, crisp December day of XC skiing at the beautiful Tahoe Donner XC resort in Truckee, CA near Lake Tahoe. We pass the newly restored cowboy cabins and shake our arms to try to get some warmth in our hands! #shorts

videos.title: The 2022 Great Ski Race
videos.description:
The 2022 The Great Ski Race in new race course: 26 KM (16.2 miles) around Mt Watson, starting and finishing at Tahoe XC.

Had the gopro loosely attached on the chest (in the webbing of a vest). A little wobbly here and there.
The data overlays from Virb are off by a few minutes, too time-consuming to fix and re-do, so... sorry.
Strava: https://www.strava.com/activities/6785047301

The Great Ski Race® is the main fund raising event for the Tahoe Nordic Search & Rescue Team, a non-profit all-volunteer organization. Team members, along with community supporters, organize The Great Ski Race®, which continues to be one of the largest Nordic ski races west of the Mississippi. Race proceeds are used primarily to purchase equipment for the Team, and to support winter survival and avalanche education programs sponsored and conducted by the Team.

Soundtrack: TSYN Deep House Mix #3 // by Androma  -- https://soundcloud.com/tsyn/tsyn-deep-house-mix-3


00:00 Start line
00:35 Wave 4 - go!
01:38 Tahoe XC crispy tracks

06:38 a lot of uphill on skis
10:58 soup station!
11:50 now for some downhill
13:43 legs on fire
15:36 cruising
18:21 back into Tahoe XC
21:01 finish line
21:57 after party

videos.title: Lake Tahoe: The Great Ski Race 2017
videos.description:
Brian and Bill venture out to Lake Tahoe in early March 2017 for an epic 4-day cross-country ski trip -- and the 40th annual Great Ski Race from Tahoe City to Truckee.  Three feet of fresh snow over the weekend helped solidify this season in the history books, with over 600 inches of snow and counting.

videos.title: Tahoe Donner Cross Country Lunch Ski with Judy #shorts
videos.description: We ski Tahoe Donner Cross Country in Truckee, CA, a fine XC resort. Amazing trails, excellent grooming, and competent and friendly staff. Not to mention the new Cross Country Center. Have a ski then enjoy a nice lunch and maybe an adult beverage in the bar or out on the patio with the gas fireplace! #shorts

videos.title: Mountain Biking Tahoe Cross Country Ski Area - Great Ski Race Trail
videos.description: Surprisingly good riding. No big climbs, and not that technical. This section is from the Fiberboard Road at the top of The Great Ski Race Trail down. There are a bunch of humps where one could get air, but as you can tell I like to keep my tires on the ground.

videos.title: Loppet ski races canceled this weekend due to bitter cold | FOX 9 KMSP
videos.description:
Due to the bitter cold forecasted for this weekend, the Loppet Foundation will be canceling some of its events for the City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival, according to organizers.
Subscribe for more from FOX 9: https://bit.ly/3p5NDSU

videos.title: Classic Cross-Country Skiing for Beginners: Everything You Need to Know to Get Started || REI
videos.description:
Classic Cross-Country skiing offers something for everyone, from exercise to beautiful winter scenery. We partnered with Greg Rhodes of the Professional Ski Instructors of America (PSIA) to give you all the basics for your first day on the trail so you'll be gliding over the snow with ease in no time.

Before Putting Skis On :29
Moving on Flat Ground 1:09
Pole Basics 3:12
Going Uphill 6:35
Going Downhill 8:07
Turning 10:52
Getting Up from a Fall 12:03
